Palette_Open_Tooltip: Open a Git repository in a new workspace
Palette_PressCtrlO: Press Ctrl+O to pick a folder.
Palette_Hints: ↑↓ select · Enter / double-click open · Ctrl+O add · Ctrl+D remove · Esc close
Palette_Frequent_Empty: Projects you open often show up here.
Toolbar_FetchPrune_Tooltip: Also drop remote-tracking branches deleted upstream
Toolbar_PullRebase_Tooltip: Replay local commits on top of upstream instead of merging
Toolbar_PullFrom_Tooltip: Pull a specific branch from a chosen remote
Toolbar_PushTo_Tooltip: Push the current branch to a chosen remote
Toolbar_CommandLog_Tooltip: Git command log — every command GitFlick ran (opens a window)
Branch_ActionsHint: Checkout / Merge / Delete act on the selected branch.
History_AuthorFilter_Tooltip: Show only commits by the ticked authors (multi-select).
History_BranchFilter_Tooltip: Show only commits reachable from the ticked branches (multi-select).
History_GraphOrder_Tooltip: Drop the sort/filter and return to git's order (which shows the lane graph).
History_FirstParentOnly_Tooltip: Collapse each merged branch to a single row — what actually landed on this branch.
History_Ctx_Checkout_Tooltip: Checks out the branch on this commit, or the commit itself (detached HEAD).
History_Ctx_CherryPick_Tooltip: Replay this commit on top of the current branch.
History_Sha_Tooltip: Click to copy the full SHA
Commit_Amend_Tooltip: Replace the last commit with the staged changes; an empty message keeps the old one
Commit_AllAmend_Tooltip: Stage everything, then amend the last commit
Commit_SignedOff_Tooltip: Commit staged changes with a Signed-off-by trailer
Commit_UndoLast_Tooltip: Move HEAD back one commit, keeping its changes staged
Commit_Generate_Tooltip: Draft a commit message from the staged diff (runs locally — nothing leaves your machine)
CommitSettings_LocalNote: ✨ Generate runs locally either way — nothing leaves your machine. Changes save automatically.
Legend_Tooltip: What the coloured letter beside each file means
CmdLog_Header: Every git command GitFlick has run
Diff_SelectCommit: Select a commit to see what it changed.
Diff_SelectFile: Select a changed file to see its diff.
Dialog_ForceDelete: Force delete (even if not fully merged)
Dialog_DeleteBranch_Body:
Delete the branch “{0}”?

This removes the branch pointer. A safe delete refuses if it isn't merged — tick the box to force it.
Dialog_DiscardAll_Body: Discard every uncommitted change? This resets all tracked files to the last commit and cannot be undone.
Dialog_DiscardChanges_Body: Discard the changes to {0}? This reverts them to the last commit (untracked files are deleted) and cannot be undone.
Dialog_PushTo_Body: Push the current branch “{0}” to which remote?
Dialog_PullFrom_Body: Pull a branch from a remote into “{0}”.
Dialog_DirtyCheckout_Body:
You have uncommitted changes.

Switch to “{0}” anyway? Git keeps your changes if it can, and refuses the switch if any would be overwritten.
Status_CurrentBranchDelete: '{0}' is the current branch — switch away before deleting it.
Status_StageFirst: Stage some changes first, then generate.
Status_EmptyMessage: The model returned an empty message.
Status_Generated: Generated a message — review before committing.
